items.title: Email Thread Summarizer
items.description: Summarize long email threads into key decisions, action items, and who said what — without reading every reply.
items.useCase: I spend 20-30 minutes every morning catching up on email threads from the day before. I need a way to get the key information fast before standup.
items.templates: No templates yet — typical threads are in Gmail and Outlook formats.

items.title: Slide Deck Outline Generator
items.description: Turn a project brief or set of bullet points into a structured slide deck outline with suggested titles, talking points per slide, and a logical flow.
items.useCase: Every time I need to present to leadership I start from scratch on the outline. It takes me 2 hours before I even open PowerPoint.
items.templates: Our standard executive deck uses: Title → Problem → Current State → Proposed Solution → Timeline → Ask.

items.title: Daily Standup Writer
items.description: Given a list of tasks completed, in-progress, and blocked, write a polished standup update in the team's preferred format.
items.useCase: Our team does written standups in Slack. I always forget to write mine before the deadline and end up rushing it.

items.title: Sprint Retro Facilitator
items.description: Paste in retro notes from the team and get back a structured summary: what went well, what didn't, key themes, and suggested action items.
items.useCase: I facilitate our sprint retros and spend an hour after each one synthesizing the sticky notes into a summary doc for the team.
items.templates: We use a Start / Stop / Continue format. Notes come out of MURAL as a text export.

items.title: PR Review Assistant
items.description: Paste a pull request diff and get back a structured code review: summary of changes, potential issues, suggested improvements, and a go/no-go recommendation.
items.useCase: I spend 30+ minutes on every PR review trying to write thorough feedback. I want a skill that helps me structure and speed that up.
items.templates:
# PR Review Assistant

Paste your diff below. The skill will output:
- Summary of changes
- Potential issues (bugs, security, perf)
- Suggested improvements
- Overall recommendation

items.title: QASP Report Generator
items.description: Generates a QASP submission based on delivery reports. Includes reference template and QA standards.
items.useCase: Program managers need a consistent, standards-aligned QASP report to document contractor performance against quality assurance surveillance plans.
items.templates: Includes readme.md, reference template, and QA standards.

items.title: VA Product Outline
items.description: Creates complete, OKR-aligned product outlines for VA.gov / VES products. Reads existing docs, asks four targeted questions, and produces a GitHub-ready markdown outline with KPI baselines, OKR mapping, and a MEMORY.md handoff file.
items.useCase: VA PMs need a consistent, OKR-compliant product outline to satisfy OCTO OKR 1.1 — documenting product vision, problem statement, and KPIs for every VES product.

items.title: Meeting Notes Formatter
items.description: Transforms raw meeting transcripts or bullet-point notes into a structured summary with decisions, action items, and owners.
items.useCase: Needed a consistent format for meeting notes that everyone on the team could follow and quickly scan.
items.templates: No templates provided — built from common patterns across multiple teams.
